description: International Container Terminal Services, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, acquires, develops, manages, and operates container ports and terminals for container shipping industry in Asia, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Americas. It provides ancillary services, including storage, container packing and unpacking, inspection, weighing, and services for refrigerated containers or reefers, as well as roll-on/roll-off and anchorage services to non-containerized or general cargoes. The company also handles containerized cargoes, which comprise cargoes shipped in containers for interna
